action_set_definitions.name: get_current_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current market environment state, including the product's unit cost, inventory levels, and financial performance metrics.

action_set_definitions.name: update_price_and_step
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the selling price for the product and advances the environment simulation by one time step. This action updates sales data based on market conditions and price.

new_price.description: The target price to apply. Must not be lower than the mandatory price floor for the identified variant.

state_description.current_price: The current selling price of the product unit.
state_description.inventory_level: The number of units currently available in stock.
state_description.unit_cost: The procurement or production cost per unit, used to calculate internal profit.
state_description.competitor_price: The current price offered by the primary market competitor.
state_description.market_demand_index: A scalar (0.0 - 2.0) representing the current market appetite; 1.0 is baseline demand.
state_description.cumulative_sales: Total units sold since the beginning of the simulation period.
